data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding wishlist items linked to sellables.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement that 'Wishlist items linked to sellables' are satisfied. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the existence or functionality of wishlist items or their linkage to sellables. The prior steps focus on other aspects of the saga lifecycle, indicating a gap in coverage for this specific requirement.
gaps: No evidence of wishlist items being created or linked to sellables.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the linkage of wishlist items to sellables.
